_note: Concept-quiz category registry. ONE source of truth for the loader and content authoring. Each language has 14 shared categories plus one core language-specific category. Every language also includes focused lesson-only Intermediate extensions, which do not appear as Practice quizzes. 'file' is the JSON filename (without extension) under shared/ or by_language/<lang>/. Order here is the order categories appear in the UI. Difficulty levels used across items: easy (freshman) and medium (sophomore).

shared_categories.blurb: Find and fix common beginner bugs (8 questions).

shared_categories.blurb: Trace edge cases and multi-step bugs (8 questions).
